title: Maestro end-to-end verification
description: Maestro toolchain wired into the harness so feature verification lists can include real-simulator runs. Smoke flow exercises the default Expo home tab.
verification: Boot an iOS simulator: npm run sim:ios
Start the app on the sim: npm run ios
Run the flow: npm run e2e
Confirm exit code 0 and screenshot/JUnit artifacts in tmp/diagnostics/
notes: Scaffolding landed via PR #2. Flipping to done needs an actual local simulator run. Originally id `e2e-001`.
